description: Digitize the medical intake form draft at /home/ga/Documents/intake_form_draft.odt by adding interactive form controls. Configure a text box named 'full_name' for 'Full Name' and a date field named 'dob' for 'Date of Birth'. In the 'Gender' section, create three option buttons sharing the name 'gender' with labels 'Male', 'Female', and 'Non-Binary' and corresponding reference values 'M', 'F', and 'NB'. For 'Medical History', include three checkboxes named 'hist_asthma', 'hist_diabetes', and 'hist_hypertension'. Save the completed interactive form to /home/ga/Documents/intake_form_interactive.odt.
